显示 HN：NASA Artemis II 任务时间线跟踪器

Show HN: NASA Artemis II Mission Timeline Tracker

www.sunnywingsvirtual.com 作者 AustinDev 分数 90 评论 16 2026/04/02 11:40
打开 HN 原帖 打开原始文章

中文摘要

  1. - 您可以在这里支持该项目！
  2. 基于 NASA 的 Artemis II 概述时间表的完整 FD01–FD10 视图。零号任务定于 2026 年 4 月 1 日美国东部时间 00/0 = 6:35 PM 进行。 3D 实时任务渲染深空网络 EJ 的流
  3. 当前任务时间 T+00:00:00 当前飞行日 FD01 当前 FD 的小时数 +00:00 当前时间 (ET) --:--:--
  4. 由 RevsUpRayes 提供
  5. 第 1 页 发射、上升、早期跨月任务

Original Summary

  1. - You can support the project here!
  2. Full FD01–FD10 view based on NASA's Artemis II Overview Timeline. Mission zero is anchored to 00/0 = 6:35 PM ET on April 1, 2026. 3D Live Mission Render Deep Space Network EJ's Stream
  3. Current mission time T+00:00:00 Current flight day FD01 Hours into current FD +00:00 Current Time (ET) --:--:--
  4. Made available by RevsUpRayes
  5. Page 1 Launch, ascent, early translunar mission

评论（默认中文）

joemi 2026/04/02 15:03
那真是太棒了！不过，有一个功能请求：您能否将鼠标悬停在（或单击）缩写词上，告诉您它的含义？缩写词太多了，像我这样的外行很难理解其中的大部分内容。
That's really awesome! One feature request though: Can you make it so mousing over (or clicking on) an acronym tells you what it means? There are so many acronyms, it's hard for a layperson like myself to understand much of it.
在 HN 中查看
AustinDev 2026/04/03 08:57
我没有建造它。我刚刚在直播中发现了它（https://www.twitch.tv/ej_sa）的使命。也许 `Show HN:` 是错误的前缀。
I didn't build it. I just found it on a live stream (https://www.twitch.tv/ej_sa) of the mission. Maybe `Show HN:` was the wrong prefix.
在 HN 中查看
tigerlily 2026/04/02 17:43
谢谢，很好的详细概述。我发现这类信息很难找到。还有这个看似我一生都无法遵循的广播时间表：

https://www.nasa.gov/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/artemis-ii-b...

还有 Orion 的实时视图： https://youtube.com/watch?v=6RwfNBtepa4

Thanks, nice detailed overview. I've found this sort of info hard to find. There's also this seeming broadcast schedule which I can't follow for the life of me:

https://www.nasa.gov/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/artemis-ii-b...

Also live views from Orion: https://youtube.com/watch?v=6RwfNBtepa4

as constructive criticism the mobile version of the site is kinda clunky

dvh 2026/04/02 17:00
一个简单的按钮来最小化蓝色面板就可以让我们完成 90% 的任务。
A simple button to minimize blue panel would get us 90% there.

i_love_retros 2026/04/02 19:44

在 HN 中查看
damnitbuilds 2026/04/02 17:59
我想要一个地球和月球的俯视图，上面显示阿耳忒弥斯当前的实时位置。

Google AI 做不到，ChatGPT 告诉我它做不到，因为 Artemis 2 还没有推出。

在我看来，这是一个显而易见的想要看到的景色。 在我看来，NASA 承包商可以将其生产压缩到这次飞行的 40 亿美元预算中。

这样的事存在吗？

I wanted a top-down view of Earth and Moon with Artemis' current live position shown on it.

Google AI couldn't do it, ChatGPT told me it couldn't do it because Artemis 2 hadn't launched yet.

Seems to me like an obvious view to want to see. Seems to me like a NASA contractor could have squeezed its production into the $4 billion budget for this flight.

Does such a thing exist ?

在 HN 中查看
trwrto 2026/04/02 18:10
https://www.nasa.gov/missions/artemis-ii/arow/ 单击任务视图，然后缩小并旋转。
https://www.nasa.gov/missions/artemis-ii/arow/ Click on mission view, then zoom out and rotate.
在 HN 中查看
damnitbuilds 2026/04/02 18:17
谢谢 ！

但我认为它是在 GTX5090 上进行测试的 - 对于我的笔记本电脑来说速度慢得无法使用。

Thanks !

But I assume it was tested on a GTX5090 - unusably slow for my laptop.
